text: Kal raat papa se placement vs sarkari naukri ko lekar bahas hui thi jo bina kisi solution ke khatam ho gayi. Main janta hoon mera Dilli aakar private job karne ka sapna unhe samajh nahi aayega, par tauji ke samne unki izzat na kharab ho isliye main aage kuch nahi bol paya. Hostel ke kamre me ab chupchap state PSC ki kitabein nikal kar baitha hoon, bas ghar ki shanti bani rahe isliye apne sapne maar raha hoon.

Hostel me kal raat papa ka phone aaya tha aur unhone saaf keh diya ki JEE nahi nikla toh ab gaon wapas aakar family dukan par baitho. Main unhe samjhana chahta tha ki main aage padhna chahta hoon, par unka gussa dekh kar mujhe 'log kya kahenge' ki unki chinta yaad aa gayi aur main phone par chup ho gaya. Unse rishta na toote aur joint family me unka sar nicha na ho, isliye maine bina kuch kahe unka faisla maan liya hai.

Kal raat ki bahas ke baad se mera dimaag sunn hai kyunki papa ne meri padhai ke beech hi rishta pakka karne ki zidd pakad li hai taaki samaj me unka rutba badhe. Maine himmat karke thoda virodh kiya tha, par jab unhone kaha ki unki health mere is nakhre se kharab ho rahi hai toh main guilty feel karne laga. Apne career ki anxiety ko dabakar maine unse maafi maang li, kyunki main nahi chahta ki meri wajah se family me koi tension aaye.

B.Tech aakhiri saal me placement nahi nikal rahi aur kal raat papa se field change karne ki baat par bohot gandi bahas hui, jisme unhone kisi aur ki ek nahi suni. Unhone seedha keh diya ki khandaan me aaj tak koi engineering me fail nahi hua aur wo meri in baaton ko nahi samjhenge. Subah maine unhe message karke bol diya ki main unke hisaab se hi chalunga, aakhir unhone mujhe padhane ke liye itna karza liya hai toh unhe aur pareshan nahi kar sakta.

Kal raat phone par jab maine Pune jaakar aage ki coaching lene ki baat ki, toh papa ne chacha ji ke darr se turant mana kar diya ki wahan akele reh kar ladke bigad jate hain. Pura argument bina kisi nateeje ke khatam hua aur main poori raat yahi sochta raha ki meri padhai zaroori hai ya ghar walo ka vishwas. Aakhir me maine yahi tay kiya ki parivaar ki izzat aur unka pyar mere career se zyada bada hai, isliye main unki baaton se agree kar lunga.
